macro.title: United Arab Emirates leaving OPEC, effective May 1 - CNBC
macro.summary: The UAE was the third-largest producer in OPEC in February, behind Saudi Arabia and Iraq.

macro.title: OpenAI reportedly missed revenue targets. Shares of Oracle and these chip stocks are falling - CNBC
macro.summary: OpenAI has recently missed its own projections for user growth and revenue, the WSJ reported.

macro.title: Eric Trump's Bitcoin Business Is A Disaster - Forbes
macro.summary: The president’s second son pitches his bitcoin company as a money-printing machine. It’s actually an arbitrage vehicle that preys on MAGA-minded investors.

macro.title: Coca-Cola tops estimates, raises earnings outlook as global beverage demand rises - CNBC
macro.summary: Shares of Coke have risen just 6% over the last year, hurt by concerns about the broader economy.

macro.title: The MAHA movement is mad about glyphosate and Trump's EPA - NPR
macro.summary: Some people in the MAHA movement are angry with the Trump administration's stance on environmental toxins — including its current support for the maker of the pesticide glyphosate.
